mapper.insert: insert into knowledge_document (title, file_name, file_url, file_path, file_type, business_type, status, chunk_count, error_message, remark, create_by) values (#{title}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{businessType}, #{status}, #{chunkCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select * from knowledge_document where id = #{id} limit 1
